name: finclaw-starter
description: FinClaw starter workspace with finance-focused defaults

cron.prompt: Morning brief: Call fin_fund_status, summarize overnight activity, identify strategies needing attention. Send the brief via message_send.
cron.name: morning-brief

cron.prompt: Evening review: Call fin_leaderboard and fin_list_promotions_ready. Analyze top/bottom performers, recommend promotions. Send summary via message_send.
cron.name: ranking-promotion

cron.prompt: Evolution sweep: Call fin_evolve_trigger to run RDAVD evolution on eligible strategies. Report results.
cron.name: evolution-sweep

cron.prompt: Weekly report: Call fin_fund_status, fin_leaderboard, fin_fund_rebalance. Compile a comprehensive weekly performance report covering returns, risk metrics, strategy lifecycle changes, and capital allocation. Send via message_send.
cron.name: weekly-report

cron.prompt: Daily rebalance: Call fin_fund_rebalance to re-profile strategies, compute correlations, and re-allocate capital. Report any changes.
cron.name: daily-rebalance
